message:
chore(gitignore): ignore full .claude/ directory, not just settings.local.json

The agent harness writes several stateful files into `.claude/` beyond
settings — `scheduled_tasks.lock`, hook state, transient agent memory
snapshots, etc. Ignoring only `.claude/settings.local.json` let the
rest slip into `git status` on every session, which repeatedly showed
up as a stray untracked dir during multi-repo sweeps.

Widen the pattern to the whole `.claude/` directory. Nothing inside is
source-of-truth; if a future tracked file needs to live there we can
`!`-negate it explicitly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -80,8 +80,8 @@ crates/*/target/
 .beads/*.pre_recovery_*
 .beads/*.recover*.sql
 
-# Claude local settings
-.claude/settings.local.json
+# Claude local settings + agent scratch dir (scheduled_tasks.lock, settings.local.json, etc.)
+.claude/
 
 # Core dumps and agent config backups
 core.*
